---
title: "sandbox_warden.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\sandbox_warden.py"
loc: 76
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.82
style_score: 3.49
intel_score: 6.66
overall_score: 4.40
---

## Intent
The `sandbox_warden.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SandboxWarden, __init__, _optimized_mirror, ignore_filter, execute_and_verify, _apply_3way_patch, _promote_skill. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SandboxWarden, __init__, _optimized_mirror, ignore_filter, execute_and_verify, _apply_3way_patch, _promote_skill. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [tempfile](file://tempfile)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SandboxWarden`
- `__init__`
- `_optimized_mirror`
- `ignore_filter`
- `execute_and_verify`
- `_apply_3way_patch`
- `_promote_skill`
